text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a break from training, King Halo and I
make our way to the park.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm not a fan of how the strong winds kick up
clouds of sand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The sand gets everywhere, clinging to my clothes
and hair. On top of that, it makes me snee—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh, speak of the dust devil!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is why I hate sand...
